name: SISTRIX
tagline: SEO visibility platform trusted by European agencies
description: SISTRIX is a leading SEO platform particularly strong in European markets. It provides a Visibility Index — an industry-standard metric for tracking organic search performance — alongside keyword research, backlink analysis, content tools, and competitor monitoring. Widely used by agencies in Germany, UK, Spain, Italy, and France.
cons: Fewer features than Semrush for PPC/social
Pricing can add up with multiple modules
use_cases: You're an SEO agency working in German, Spanish, French, or Italian markets where SISTRIX's Visibility Index is the standard reporting metric
You need to benchmark a client's organic visibility against competitors using a credible, widely-recognised index rather than raw traffic estimates
Your team monitors algorithm update impacts across European markets and wants granular historical Visibility data to detect drops fast
You want clean, focused competitor monitoring without the feature bloat of Semrush's PPC and social modules
